reviews.comment:
Pésima atención , los playeros en vez de atender a los clientes , gritándose de un surtidor al otro como si estuviesen en la cancha ! Mucha demora para que te atiendan , ven que estás para cargar y miran para otro lado ! A ver si ponen personal con ganas de trabajar el que está deja mucho que desear !

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! Instead of helping customers, the attendants are shouting at each other from pump to pump like they're on a soccer field! It takes forever to get served; they see you're there to fill up and just look the other way! They really need to hire staff who actually want to work; the ones they have are terrible!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRd3MzNmR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Saque el lavado más caro, no incluye que aspiren el baúl, la chapa tiene suciedad y marcas por todos lados.. lejos de estar bien lavado.. pedí si por favor lo repasaba y me dijeron que no, que la maquina lavado y ellos solo serán...
O sea si necesitas lavar el auto rapido saca solo la maquina y listo, no es perfecta pero zafa.. cualquier otro lavado es robo

(Translated by Google)
I got the most expensive wash, it doesn't include vacuuming the trunk, the bodywork is dirty and has marks all over it... far from being properly washed... I asked if they could please give it a once-over and they said no, they'd just wash the machine and they'd just...
I mean, if you need a quick car wash, just take out the machine and that's it. It's not perfect, but it does the trick... any other wash is robbery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRcWV6eDR3RRAB
